programmes.show_description: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tabharfaidh Hector faoi thuras ina chuaifeach ar fud na hÉireann ag casadh le daoine éagsúla. (Hector takes us on a whirlwind tour of Ireland meeting people from all over the World.)
Tá Eva in amhras faoin deontóir speirme a fuair sí agus socraíonn sí dul go Cóbanhávan chun bualadh leis. (Eva seeks out her sperm donor without revealing why.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Súil siar ar na hagallaimh, taibhléirithe agus gearrscannáin ón tsraith Imeall. (A look back at interviews, performances and short film pieces from the series Imeall.)
Tabharfaidh Breanndán cuairt ar Pharóiste Múrdhach agus labhróidh sé le Cailín Ní Mhuircheartaigh McGann. (Breanndán visits the parish of Múrdhach.)
Tugann Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Chiarraí Thuaidh sa gclár seo chun blaiseadh a fháil de cheol na háite. (Doireann Ní Ghlacáin explores North Kerry's rich musical tradition.)
Rogha amhrán ó shraith a 17 de Ghlór Tíre. (Featuring The Sheerin Family, Cliona Hagan, Michael English, Mike Denver, Louise Morrissey & Robert Mizzell.)
Rachaidh Mairéad agus Conall go Málta chun obair dheonach a dhéanamh ar fheirm Vincent. (Mairéad and Conall are off to the island of Malta to volunteer at Vincent's Farm.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Bhí an-lá ag Ribín ach bhí fíor-dhrochlá ag Glibín. Céard a tharla? (Ribín had an amazing day but poor Glibín had a terrible day. How could this be?)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann is an bhfuil taibhse sa gharáiste? Tá Bobby an Bus ag sileadh ola. (Is there a ghost in the garage on Halloween? Bobby the Bus is leaking oil.)
Tugann Cory agus Chrissy lámh chúnta do Mháire. (Cory and Chrissy help Mary Mailtruck with her deliveries.)
Tá Pip agus Streak ag iarraidh teachín a thógáil do gach duine sa chlós. (Pip and Streak want to build a Cubby House for everyone in the barnyard.)
Déanann Zee roicéad ollmhór i mbuidéal ach bíonn sé féin sáinnithe ann sa deireadh. (Zee makes a giant rocket ship in a bottle, but things take a turn when he gets stuck inside!)
Tugann Zee lá saoire don Fheirmeoir De Brún ach roghnaigh sé lá an-chrúógach ar an bhfeirm le scíth a ligean. (Zee gives MacBarm the day off for what turns out to be a busy day!)
Caithfidh Gekko guaim a choinneáil air féin. (Gekko has to be responsible for the sake of everyone else's Easter eggs, will he succeed?)
Bhí an-spraoi ag Sibéal inniu í ag réiteach don Cháisc. (Sibéal has lots of fun today getting ready for Easter.)
Beidh Síofra ag maisiú uibheacha don Cháisc inniu! (Today Síofra will be decorating eggs for Easter!)
Caithfidh Pinocchio agus Conal Mór cleite ulchabháin a aimsiú. (Pinocchio and Buaiceasaín are challenged to get an owl's feather.)
Faigheann Pinocchio hata Leipreacháin ar iasacht. (Pinocchio borrows a Leprechaun's magic hat.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Téann an cat amach in éineacht le Nic agus Sailí sa chúlghairdín. (The Cat joins Nick & Sally who are exploring the backyard.)
Tá Zak roghnaithe le seó tallainne na scoile a chur i láthair. (Zak has been chosen to present the school's talent competition!)
Déanfaidh buaiteoir an chomórtais gleacaíochta ar scoil ionadaíocht ar an scoil i gcomórtas mór. (The winner of the school's gymnastics competition will represent the school.)
Goidtear smiotán JC. (Someone steals JC's fly swatter.)
Tá Sam ag iarraidh go mbeadh smacht aici ar an aimsir. (Sam asks for the power to control the weather.)
Tá an Máistir Bríce ag tabhairt faoi thurgnamh nua agus teastaíonn rannpháirtí uaidh. (Mr. Brick needs to find a volunteer for the school's Nap Experiment.)
Beidh Janelle ag taispeáint cineálacha éagsúla aclaíochta. ( Janelle will be showing us new and different exercises.)
Castar frog, atá ar leaba an bháis ar Finn agus Jake. (Finn and Jake meet a dying frog-turned gnome knight who is bestowed upon three.)
Téann Bentley agus Taffy trí thairseach chuig saol eile atá i scáthán a cheannaigh Bean Uí Bhreá-Mór. (Taffy & Bentley find a portal to a version of their own house.)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Feicfear Craobh Lomadh Caorach na hÉireann ag Seó Chluain Maine sa gclár seo. (We head to the Clonmany Show to see the All-Ireland Sheep Shearing Championship.)
Dúnmharaítear duine de na haíonna ag cóisir bhréigéide. (An unwanted guest is murdered at a costume party.)
Bliain nua, tús maith agus tá na conraitheoirí ar a mine ghéire. (It's the new year and our contractors are back hard at work.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Chraobh Iomána Allianz Roinn 1B. Á chur i láthair ag Micheál Ó Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Hurling League Division 1B Final.)
Craoladh beo ar Chluiche Ceannais Chraobh Iomána Allianz Roinn 1A. Á chur i láthair ag Micheál Ó Domhnaill. (Live coverage of the Allianz Hurling League Division 1A Final.)
Clár tráth na gceist i nGaeilge do dhéagóirí! Scoil Pháirc Shruth na gCloch v Pobalscoil na Gráinsí. (Teen quiz show: Rockbrook Park School v Ramsgrange Community School.)

Téann Fionn ag múitseáil ón scoil chun lá amháin eile a chaitheamh lena Mhamó. (Fionn skips school to spend one last day with his grandmother.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Anna Mullarkey agus Jack Warnock a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Anna Mullarkey and Jack Warnock rise to the challenge.)
Tá plean ag Cam chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar Cora agus cuireann sí ina luí ar Vince cúnamh a thabhairt dó.(Cam comes up with a plan to sabotage Cora.)
Tugtar léargas ar an tionchar a bhí ag ceol an Lucht Siúil ar cheol na hÉireann . (Ag Taisteal Siar explores the contribution of Traveller music to Ireland's musical legacy.)
Leanfaidh Sharon Shannon agus a neacht Caoilinn lena dturas mórthimpeall na gceantar atá suite i gcroílár na tíre. (Sharon and Caoilinn continue their journey.)

The Bonny Men a bheidh i mbun cainte le Dáithí sa chlár seo. (In this episode, Dáithí Ó Sé meets with The Bonny Men.)
Feictear athbheochan pholaitiúil De Valera sa dara chuid den tsraith seo. (In part two of this dramatic story, De Valera's political rebirth unfolds.)
Iarla Ó Lionáird, Cormac McCarthy agus Matthew Berrill a thabharfaidh faoi chomhar ceoil sa gclár seo. (Featuring music from Iarla Ó Lionáird, Cormac McCarthy and Matthew Berrill.)

Níl Bréidín in ann coinneáil le Clúmh agus tarraingíonn sé rolla iomlán de ribín den spól. (Fluff runs rings around Tweedy as he pulls an entire roll of ribbon off a reel.)
Tá Cody tar éis bogadh díreach béal dorais dá chara JJ. (Cody has moved right next to his best friend JJ!)
Dreapann Bóba an Béar suas an clog agus titeann sé anuas arís! (Boba the Bear runs up the clock and quickly falls down again!)
Cuireann an Caimileon an dallamullóg ar na Dathanna. (The Chameleon plays tricks on the Colours.)
Tá Freddie ar bís faoi bheith ag dul chuig an rinc oighir. (Freddie is excited to visit the ice rink.)
Beidh an-spraoi ag Caitríona agus Roy agus iad ag imirt iománaíochta. (Caitríona and Roy are playing hurling today and it's great fun!)
Ag foghlaim faoi eolaithe a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about scientists today.)
Ag foghlaim faoi bheith ag tarraingt pictiúr a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo learns all about drawing today.)
Déanann Pip agus Posy dearmad ar an méid a gheall siad do Jamila. (Pip and Posy forget a promise they made to Jamila.)
Tá clocha móra le feiceáil ar fud na foraoise. (Giant rocks appear all over the forest.)
Ceapann Armadylan gur duine de na PJ Masks é ach an gceapann na laochra an rud céanna? (Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks.)
Tagann Wussywat ar bhosca mór millteach sa ghairdín & tá sí ag iarraidh é a oscailt ach cinneann sé uirthi. (Wussywat finds a music box in the garden & wants to open it.)
Ligeann ár gcairde orthu féin gur muscaedóirí cróga iad. (The members of the "Birdwell Islandeers" realize they don't all agree on what it means to be a hero.)
Tá lá spóirt le bheith acu sa Ghairdín Draíochta inniu ach cé leis a mbeidh an lá? (It's sports day in the Magic Garden. Who will be the winner?)
Tá Minty ag eitilt thart ar dhroim Bokchoydachtalach óg. (Minty soars over the valley on a baby Bokchoydactyl's back.)
Tá Dot ag súil go mór lena col ceathrar Margot a fheiceáil. (Dot is super excited to reunite with her cousin Margot.)
Féachann Henry le túr a thógáil ach ní fhanfaidh sé ina sheasamh. (Henry wants to build a tower but the girls will not listen to his advice.)

Nuair a bhrúchtann bolcán ar an Oileán Eachtraíochta téann na dineasáir óga amú. (When an earthquake erupts on a volcanic island the young ones are separated from their family.)
Tá an leabhar ina bhfuil pleananna uile Angelo goidte ag Tracy. (Tracy steals the book Angelo has been keeping filled with his strategies.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi rothaí an bhus a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the wheels on the bus.)
Imríonn sé déag cluiche cóisire. (Sixteen plays a party game.)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Clódóirí ag déanamh dathanna éagsúla. (The Printing Crew have lots of fun making different colours.)
Réitíonn Posy agus Jamila deoch rúnda nuair a bhíonn siad féin agus a gcairde ag ligean orthu féin gur cailleacha iad. (Posy and Jamila concoct a secret potion.)
Tá Helen ag iarraidh rialacha cluiche a mhíniú ach cuireann an Ridire Risteard isteach uirthi. (Helen is trying to explain the rules to a ball game.)
Tugann Helen puzal do gach dalta le déanamh. (Helen decided to set each student a puzzle.)

programmes.show_name: True agus Ríocht an Bhogha Ceatha
programmes.show_description: Glacann True an iomarca oibre uirthi féin agus téann éinín beag ar strae uirthi! (True commits to too many jobs today and as a result a little bird escapes!)
Tugann Daideo & Daidí cúnamh do Zou pancóga a dhéanamh don díolachán cácaí ach ní éiríonn rómhaith leo. (Grandpa and Dad help Zou make pancakes for the school cake sale.)
Inniu feicfidh muid gadhar ag snámh, cearca cróga agus ulchabhán ag glaoch. (Today we'll see dogs who doggy paddle, chickens who play chicken, and owls who... who!)
Achoimre ar chuid de mhórscéalta na seachtaine mar a craoladh ar Nuacht TG4. (Some of the stories from this week's regional news as seen on Nuacht TG4.)
Coinníonn Lois bronntanais na Nollag óna clann mhac chun smacht a choinneáil orthu. (Lois tries to get the boys to behave until Christmas by holding their presents hostage.)
Ní bhíonn Sam ag iarraidh a insint do dhaoine faoi mar a caitheadh sa tóin é. (Sam makes up an elaborate story to explain how he got shot in the rear end.)
Tugann fear ait cuairt ar theach Jessica. An mhaidin chéanna tuairiscítear go bhfuil ilmhilliúnaí ar iarraidh. (Jessica has an odd encounter the same day a millionaire goes missing.)
Buaicphointí ó chomórtas Steip ag Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 i mBéal Feirste. (Highlights from the Steip competition at Oireachtas na Samhna 2025 in Belfast.)

programmes.show_name: Scannán: Has Anybody Seen My Gal
programmes.show_description: Féachann fear lena chuid milliún a fhágáil ag muintir a chéad ghrá. An aging heir-less millionaire wants to leave his fortune to the unsuspecting family.
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó fhéile Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024 i gCorca Dhuibhne. (Pádraig Ó Sé brings us the best of music from Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024.)

Díbríonn an Tiarna Farquaad gach a bhfuil sna scéalta sí isteach sa choill. (A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swamp of a grumpy ogre.)

Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Is i gCarna a bheidh Áine an tseachtain seo. (Áine Ní Bhreisléain is in Carna as she explores the west coast and the communities that work there.)
Buaicphointí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, cluichí ceannais shraitheanna Allianz san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA action including the Allianz League finals.)
Ní bhíonn Sam ag iarraidh a insint do dhaoine faoi mar a caitheadh sa tóin é. (Sam makes up an elaborate story to explain how he got shot in the rear end.)
Cuirtear grúpa cairde a thagann le chéile chun cluichí a imirt i gcruachás ceart. (A group of friends who meet regularly for game nights find themselves entangled in a mystery.)

Tá Téacs Taistil ar ais! Tugann na taistealaithe aghaidh ar Toronto sa gclár seo. (Téacs Taistil is back! This week, the gang touch down in Toronto.)
